Channels
Notification channels for system events

No channels configured yet. Add one to receive notifications for builds, crashes, and system events.

✉ Telegram
Bot notifications to any Telegram chat or group. Get alerts instantly on your phone.
📧 Email
Send notifications via AgentMail. Great for build reports and daily digests.
🔗 Webhook
POST JSON payloads to any URL. Integrate with Slack, Discord, or custom endpoints.
💬 WhatsApp
Business API notifications. Requires a Meta WhatsApp Business account.

Cortex
System monitoring · Scheduler · Webhooks
🧠

Cortex — Automation Engine

Not installed on this node

Cortex is SPAWN's optional automation layer. It adds:

⏰
Scheduler
Cron-style job scheduling — run builds, backups, health checks, or any task on a schedule.
🔗
Webhook Ingress
Receive webhooks from GitHub, Stripe, or any service. Route them to actions, scripts, or Claude sessions.
🔔
Notifications
Send alerts via email, Telegram, or webhooks when jobs run, builds fail, or thresholds are hit.

Install Cortex

Ask Claude to set it up, or deploy manually:

claude "Install spawn-cortex on this node"
Files
Drag files between panes to transfer
Local (Browser)
Click "Open Folder" to browse local files
(Chrome/Edge: folder browsing | Others: file picker)

V
Recommended: Deploy on Vultr
The preferred cloud provider for SPAWN deployments
8+ Years Proven Built by a long-time Vultr customer. Reliable, fast, and well-priced cloud infrastructure you can trust.
Built-in Integration SPAWN includes native Vultr API support. Create, manage, and deploy instances directly from this dashboard.
Support SPAWN Signing up through our link helps fund SPAWN development at no extra cost to you.

No instances found. Click + Create VPS to launch one.

Tailscale Funnel

Expose any project to the public internet — one at a time

https://spawn.tail852587.ts.net
Funnel not enabled on your tailnet.
Enable it in the Tailscale admin console first, then refresh this page.
